---
description: This file describes the instructions for working on the LaTeX expose template at TH Nürnberg.
applyTo: "expose/**/*.tex,expose/**/*.bib,refs.bib"
---

# LaTeX Expose Template for TH Nürnberg

- You are working on the thesis expose template inside `expose/`. The BibTeX file is shared with the thesis template and located at the root path `refs.bib`.
- The expose is a short thesis proposal and should stay concise and focused on the problem, goal, approach, and literature.
- It is important to formulate the problem and the goals of the thesis clearly.
- Template options and usage follow the main README, except the report option does not apply.

## Formatting and Style

- Each sentence should be on a separate line to make it easier to see differences using version control.
- Use consistent language and maintain the technical depth expected of an academic proposal.
- The final expose should not exceed the two-page target unless the user explicitly asks for a different length.
